overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through the Arasaka corporate district. The player moves along a futuristic pedestrian walkway with distinctive red overhead structures, approaching the Arasaka headquarters building under clear afternoon skies. The environment features sleek dark architecture, palm trees, and corporate branding.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway between corporate buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered walkway toward the distant plaza

entered.detail: distinctive red steel beams forming overhead walkway structure
tall dark building with horizontal slats and red neon accent lighting
grey tiled pedestrian walkway with red accent line

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a covered corporate walkway. Red steel overhead structures dominate the upper frame while a sleek dark building with horizontal architectural lines runs along the right side. The walkway is empty and the camera moves steadily forward toward a distant opening.

scene_state.functional_zone: open corporate plaza with Arasaka headquarters ahead

events.description: walkway opens into wide plaza revealing the Arasaka headquarters building in the distance

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the plaza toward the Arasaka building entrance

entered.detail: large black corporate building with white Arasaka logo and branding
tall palm trees lining the left side of the plaza
large vertical billboards on the left building facade

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide corporate plaza with the Arasaka headquarters building now visible ahead. Palm trees and large advertising billboards line the left side while the red overhead structures recede to the left. The camera continues walking forward across the open tiled plaza toward the building entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: Arasaka headquarters entrance and adjacent street

events.description: camera turns right toward the street adjacent to the Arasaka building
futuristic vehicles pass by on the street ahead with motion blur

agents.ego_description: approaching the Arasaka entrance then turning right toward the street where vehicles are moving

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving past on the street with motion blur

entered.detail: red and white concrete barriers near the building entrance
asphalt road with moving traffic and street markings

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the Arasaka headquarters entrance with its prominent logo, then turns right toward an adjacent street. Concrete security barriers line the entrance area. As the camera turns, the view opens to a street with moving futuristic vehicles visible in the distance, and the red overhead structure now crosses above the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a confined corporate corridor into a sprawling urban plaza and finally toward a busy futuristic street. It begins with a steady walk along a covered walkway, where red steel overhead structures and a sleek dark building frame the path. As the camera moves forward, the corridor opens into a wide tiled plaza, shifting the perspective to reveal palm trees, large advertising billboards, and the Arasaka headquarters building ahead. The scene then narrows as the camera approaches the building's logo and security barriers before turning right toward an adjacent road. Finally, the view expands to show moving futuristic vehicles in the distance as the red overhead structures stretch across the open street.
